title: peucedanum arenarium subsp. neumayeri
intro: Peucedanum arenarium subsp. neumayeri is a subspecies of the Peucedanum arenarium plant, also known as a type of umbelliferous herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Peucedanum arenarium subsp. neumayeri can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
